channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister condemns riot but urges review of police anti-racism guidance following Henry Nowak death – UK politics live
item.description: Minister condemns riot but urges review of police anti-racism guidance following Henry Nowak death – UK politics live

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson messages could form a manual in the dark arts of wielding power and keeping it

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Kemi Badenoch, Keir Starmer…well done for your contribution to this group project.
item.description: Kemi Badenoch, Keir Starmer…well done for your contribution to this group project.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Minister condemns riots after UK rightwing leaders call for ‘rage’ over student killing

item.title: Sky News Politics: 'Keir Starmer made us promises - and we thought they'd be kept'
